zh.lifeSummary: 當Sancho Núñez de Celanova於1070年出生在西班牙加利西亞武倫瑟拉諾瓦時，他的父親Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova21歲，母親Sancha Gomes de Souza16歲。他於1119年與Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal在葡萄牙布拉加結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1130年在葡萄牙利斯波亞利斯波亞享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sancho Núñez de Celanova于1070年出生在西班牙加利西亞武倫瑟拉諾瓦时，他的父亲Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova21岁，母亲Sancha Gomes de Souza16岁。他于1119年与Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal在葡萄牙布拉加结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1130年在葡萄牙利斯波亞利斯波亞享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Núñez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Rafael, Pedro, Jorge, Ramon.  Portuguese Guilherme, Joaquim, Vasco, Wenceslao.
Spanish (Núñez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Nuño (see Nuno ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Nuno
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Salvador, Alfredo, Carlos, Francisco, JoseLuis, Miguel, Luis, Manuel, Alfonso.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo.
Spanish (Nuño), Portuguese, and Galician: from a medieval personal name, first attested in the Latin form Nunnus, of uncertain derivation.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sancho
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, perhaps from Latin sanctus ‘holy’. It will always be associated with Sancho Panza , Don Quixote's companion.

historicEvents.description: Afonso inherits the County of Portugal, a province of Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Sancho Núñez de Celanova was born in 1070, in Celanova, Ourense, Galicia, Spain, his father, Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova, was 21 and his mother, Sancha Gomes de Souza, was 16. He married Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal in 1119, in Braga, Portugal. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1130, in Lisbon, Lisbon, Portugal, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sancho Núñez de Celanova est né en 1070, à Celanova, Ourense, Galicia, Espagne, son père, Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sancha Gomes de Souza, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal en 1119, à Braga, Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1130, à Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sancho Núñez de Celanova 1070 in Celanova, Ourense, Galicia, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova 21 und seine Mutter Sancha Gomes de Souza 16. Er hat 1119 in Braga, Portugal Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1130 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sancho Núñez de Celanova è nato il nel 1070 nel Celanova, Ourense, Galicia, Spagna, il suo padre, Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Sancha Gomes de Souza, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal nel 1119, nel Braga, Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1130, nel Lisboa, Lisboa, Portogallo, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Ribadouro, Baião, Porto, Portugal: ポルトガルポルトーベイaオリバドウロ
ja.Celanova, Orense, Galicia, Spain: スペインガリシアオウレンゼセラノヴァ
ja.Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal: ポルトガルリスボアリスボア
ja.lifeSummary: Sancho Núñez de Celanovaが1070年にスペインガリシアオウレンゼセラノヴァで生まれた時，父Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanovaは21歳，母Sancha Gomes de Souzaは16歳であった。1119年にポルトガルブラガでSancha Henriques Infanta de Portugalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1130年にポルトガルリスボアリスボアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sancho Núñez de Celanova(이)가 1070년 스페인 갈리샤 우렌스 세랜바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Sancha Gomes de Souza(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1119년 포르투갈 브라가에서 Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1130년 포르투갈 리스보 리스보에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sancho Núñez de Celanova nasceu em 1070, em Celanova, Ourense, Galicia, Espanha, seu pai, Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Sancha Gomes de Souza, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal em 1119, em Braga, Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1130, em Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sancho Núñez de Celanova родился в 1070 г. в местности селанова, оуренс, галися, Испания, его отцу по имени Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sancha Gomes de Souza, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal в 1119 г. в местности брага, Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1130 г. в местности лисбоа, лисбоа, Португалия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sancho Núñez de Celanova nació en 1070, en Celanova, Orense, Galicia, España, su papá, Conde Núñez Vasques Patriarca de Celanova, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Sancha Gomes de Souza, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal en 1119, en Braga, Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1130, en Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal, a la edad de 60 años.
